title: Language Change
scenario: Language change for voice prompts triggers DFU process and applies correctly after firmware update on Device Settings screen
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Select a new language from the list (e.g., French, German, Spanish)
Observe the popup informing that a software update is required to apply the language change
Wait for the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process to complete
After update completes, observe the Home screen is displayed
Verify the selected language is applied to voice prompts and alerts (e.g., 'Incoming call from John' or 'Mute on')
expected: After the DFU completes, the user is returned to the Home screen and the selected language is properly applied to all voice prompts and alerts.
